stories.title: Mystics outlast Fire in WNBA record-tying 4 OTs
stories.summary: Sonia Citron scored a career-high 32 points, including the basket that put her team ahead to stay with 21.4 seconds left, and the Washington Mystics held off the Portland Fire 124-123 on Sunday in four overtimes -- tying the longest game in WNBA history.

stories.title: Ryu takes Women's PGA after record-tying rally
stories.summary: Haeran Ryu recovered from a rough start to secure her first major title, winning the Women's PGA Championship by two strokes over Ina Yoon on a windy Sunday at Hazeltine National Golf Club.

stories.title: Sources: Suns land Bridges in deal with Hornets
stories.summary: The Hornets are trading Miles Bridges, a 2029 first-round pick and a second-round pick to the Suns for Grayson Allen, Royce O'Neale and a 2033 first.

stories.title: Marsch's 'Canadian heroes' deliver defining win
stories.summary: After Canada beat South Africa to win its first-ever FIFA World Cup knockout match and advance to the round of 16, head coach Jesse Marsch didn't hesitate to use the word heroes in describing his team.

stories.title: Schwarber sets Phils mark with MLB-best 30th HR
stories.summary: Phillies slugger Kyle Schwarber became the first major leaguer to reach 30 homers this season and the fastest to do so in franchise history.
